title: Refs chief Webb confirms grappling consultation
summary: Referees' chief Howard Webb confirmed that disallowing West Ham's late equalizer against Arsenal was correct due to grappling during play. The statement clarifies refereeing standards for controversial match-deciding moments.
content: Disallowing West Ham's last-ditch equaliser against Arsenal on Sunday was the right decision, referees' chief Howard Webb says.

zh.title: 裁判主任韦伯确认缠斗咨询
zh.summary: 足球裁判主任霍华德·韦伯确认，由于比赛中的身体缠斗，不承认西汉姆联队对阿森纳的后期扳平球是正确的。该声明澄清了对有争议的决定比赛关键时刻的裁判标准。

title: 'I'm not going anywhere' - furious Real president Perez calls for elections
summary: Real Madrid president Florentino Perez declared his commitment to the club despite a trophyless season, calling for club elections at a tense press conference. His defiant stance signals tension following disappointing campaign results.
content: Real Madrid president Florentino Perez stages a tense press conference in which he argues with journalists and calls for elections off the back of a trophyless season.

zh.title: "我不会去任何地方" - 愤怒的皇马主席佩雷斯呼吁选举
zh.summary: 皇家马德里主席弗洛伦蒂诺·佩雷斯在一场紧张的新闻发布会上宣布对俱乐部的承诺，尽管赛季无冠，并呼吁俱乐部进行选举。他的强硬立场表明在令人失望的赛季成绩后存在的紧张局势。

title: Bale more 'complete' than Ronaldo - Casemiro
summary: Casemiro, who played with both at Real Madrid, called Cristiano Ronaldo the greatest footballer he's worked with but rated Gareth Bale as the most well-rounded player. The comparison highlights different strengths between two iconic Real Madrid stars.
content: Manchester United's former Real Madrid midfielder Casemiro says Cristiano Ronaldo is the greatest footballer he has played with - but that Gareth Bale is the "most complete".

zh.title: 卡塞米罗：贝尔比罗纳尔多更"全面"
zh.summary: 在皇家马德里与两人都合作过的卡塞米罗称克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多是他合作过的最伟大的足球运动员，但认为加里斯·贝尔是最全面的球员。这个对比突出了两位标志性皇家马德里球星之间的不同优势。

title: Stormzy's film company to co-produce Wright biopic
summary: Stormzy's production company will co-produce a biographical film about ex-footballer and Match of The Day pundit Wright. The project marks an expansion of Stormzy's entertainment ventures beyond music.
content: The film will explore the early life of the ex-footballer and former Match of The Day pundit.

zh.title: Stormzy电影公司将联合制作Wright传记电影
zh.summary: Stormzy的制片公司将参与联合制作一部关于前足球运动员兼《今日比赛》评论员Wright的传记电影。该项目标志着Stormzy娱乐业务的扩展，超越了音乐领域。

title: Slavia Prague punished for pitch invasion
summary: Slavia Prague was fined following a pitch invasion during their match against Sparta Prague that forced the abandonment of the game. The disciplinary action reflects consequences for fan misconduct.
content: Slavia Prague are fined after a mass pitch invasion sees their match against rivals Sparta Prague abandoned

zh.title: 斯拉维亚布拉格因球场入侵事件被处罚

title: McInnes and O'Neill keeping cool as Premiership title race catches fire
summary: While media and fans intensify excitement about the Scottish Premiership title race conclusion, managers McInnes and O'Neill maintain composure and downplay the hype. Their measured approach contrasts with external speculation about the season's finale.
content: It seems as though everyone is hyping up the conclusion to the Scottish Premiership title race. Everyone except those involved, that is.

zh.title: 苏格兰超级联赛冠军争夺升温，麦金尼斯和奥尼尔保持冷静
zh.summary: 当媒体和球迷为苏格兰超级联赛冠军争夺的最后阶段增添热度时，主教练麦金尼斯和奥尼尔保持沉着并低调处理。他们的冷静态度与外界对赛季结束的猜测形成对比。

title: BBC Women's Football Weekly
summary: This BBC Women's Football Weekly segment examines the strategic and tactical success factors behind Manchester City's dominance in women's football. The analysis explores the elements contributing to the club's competitive advantage.
content: What did Manchester City get so right?

zh.title: BBC女子足球周刊
zh.summary: BBC女子足球周刊这一期检视了曼城在女子足球中占据主导地位的战略和战术成功因素。该分析探讨了促成俱乐部竞争优势的要素。

title: 'Gutted but proud' - Millwall's season of progress
summary: Millwall's season ended in a Championship play-off semi-final defeat to Hull City, but former striker Steve Morison emphasized the club's overall progress. The loss signals a disappointing playoff exit despite a positive season trajectory.

zh.title: '失望但自豪' - 米尔沃尔赛季进步

title: Tuchel submits 55-man provisional World Cup squad
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel submitted a 55-player provisional squad for the upcoming World Cup, including Luke Shaw, Danny Welbeck, and Alex Scott. The large provisional list will be trimmed to a final squad before the tournament.
content: Thomas Tuchel submits his provisional England squad for the World Cup, with Luke Shaw, Danny Welbeck and Alex Scott believed to be among the players named.

zh.title: 图赫尔提交55人世界杯临时名单
zh.summary: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图赫尔为即将到来的世界杯提交了55人的临时大名单，包括卢克·肖、丹尼·韦尔贝克和亚历克斯·斯科特。这份临时大名单将在赛前被裁减为最终名单。

title: Isak and Gyokeres named in Sweden World Cup squad
summary: Sweden named Arsenal striker Viktor Gyokeres and Liverpool forward Alexander Isak in their World Cup squad. Both players represent key attacking options for Sweden's tournament campaign.
content: Arsenal striker Viktor Gyokeres and Liverpool forward Alexander Isak are named in Sweden's World Cup squad.

title: Barnsley reappoint Stendel as head coach
summary: Barnsley has rehired Daniel Stendel as head coach, bringing back the manager who led the club to promotion in 2019. The reappointment follows Conor Hourihane's departure from the position.
content: Barnsley reappoint Daniel Stendel, who led the club to promotion in 2019, as head coach following Conor Hourihane's departure.

zh.title: 巴恩斯利重新任命斯滕德尔为主教练

title: White out for season and set to miss World Cup
summary: Arsenal and England defender Ben White has suffered a knee injury that will sideline him for the remainder of the season and the upcoming World Cup. The absence is a significant blow to both club and country's defensive options.

title: Scotland to play Israel behind closed doors in Hungary
summary: Scotland's women's team will play a World Cup qualifying double-header against Israel at a neutral venue in Hungary with no spectators allowed. The behind-closed-doors arrangement reflects security or diplomatic considerations.
content: Scotland's Women's World Cup qualifying double-header against Israel next month will be played behind closed doors at a neutral stadium in Hungary.

summary: Chelsea faces a rebuilding challenge for next season's Women's Super League as they enter the final match without any remaining trophies to contest. The situation provides the club an opportunity to plan squad improvements.
content: Chelsea are in an unusual position with one game to go in the Women's Super League and no silverware on the line.

zh.title: 切尔西如何为下赛季女超联赛重建？
zh.summary: 切尔西在进入最后一场比赛时面临下赛季女超联赛的重建挑战，没有剩余奖杯可争夺。这种情况为俱乐部规划球队改善提供了机会。

title: Barcelona manager Flick agrees new contract
summary: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick has signed a contract extension following their successful La Liga campaign that resulted in the club's 29th title. The new deal secures Flick's future and rewards his effective management.
content: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick agrees a contract extension after leading the Spanish giants to a 29th La Liga title.

zh.title: 巴塞罗那主教练弗利克同意新合同

title: It's West Ham or Spurs - how relegation fight is shaping up
summary: With two games remaining in the Premier League season, Tottenham and West Ham are battling for survival to avoid relegation. The tight race between these two established clubs will be decided in the final matches of the campaign. The outcome represents a dramatic reversal of expectations for both teams this season.
content: With two games remaining of the Premier League season, Tottenham and West Ham are the two horses left in the race to avoid relegation.

zh.title: 西汉姆或热刺——降级争夺战如何演变

title: 'No question mark' over Rohl's Rangers future after board talks
summary: Rangers manager Danny Rohl has received assurance from the Ibrox board that his position is secure following discussions about his future. The confirmation provides stability for the Rangers coaching staff as the team plans ahead. This ends speculation about potential managerial changes at the club.
content: Danny Rohl says he has been assured of his position as Rangers head coach by the Ibrox board.

zh.title: 董事会谈话后，罗尔执教的流浪者队前景'没有疑问'

title: Forest Women part company with boss Davies
summary: Nottingham Forest Women have ended their working relationship with head coach Carly Davies after the team finished seventh in WSL 2. The parting comes following a mid-table season in England's second-tier women's football division. The club will now seek new leadership for the upcoming campaign.
content: Nottingham Forest Women part company with head coach Carly Davies after finishing seventh in WSL 2.

zh.title: 森林女足与教练戴维斯分手

title: Southampton ask for more time over spying claims
summary: Southampton have requested additional time to complete an internal review after being charged with spying on Championship play-off rivals Middlesbrough. The club is investigating the allegations before providing a formal response to the charges. The incident has raised questions about conduct standards in the Championship.
content: Southampton request more time to conduct an internal review after being charged with spying on Championship play-off rivals Middlesbrough.

content: Vote to find out what goal will be crowned Scotland's greatest.

zh.title: 苏格兰最具标志性的进球是什么？这次是格里菲斯对阵杰米尔

title: Forty years of the EFL play-offs - choose your favourite memories
summary: BBC Sport is celebrating 40 years of the English Football League play-offs by highlighting 15 memorable moments from the competition's history. The play-offs have produced dramatic finishes and unexpected triumphs throughout their four decades of existence. Fans are invited to reflect on their favorite memories from the knockout tournament.

title: How many points do you need to stay in the Premier League?

content: The family of former WSL manager Matt Beard tell BBC Sport about the emotional burden of football management, and the changes they want to see.

summary: Tottenham manager Roberto De Zerbi criticized officiating decisions following his team's 1-1 draw with Leeds United on Monday. The result leaves Spurs battling to avoid Premier League relegation.

zh.title: 德泽尔比为热刺平局中"不镇定"的裁判决定而愤怒

title: 'Sea of blaugrana' celebrate Barcelona LaLiga win
summary: Barcelona's streets filled with supporters celebrating the club's latest La Liga title triumph on Monday. The massive turnout demonstrated the significance of the championship victory.
content: The streets of Barcelona turned into a "sea of blaugrana" Monday to celebrate the team's La Liga title win.

title: Atleti says USMNT's Cardoso set for ankle surgery

zh.title: 马竞表示美国队卡多索将接受踝关节手术

title: Napoli loss sets up crowded Serie A top-4 sprint

zh.title: 那不勒斯失利 意甲前四争夺进入白热化

zh.title: 消息人士：詹姆斯离开明尼苏达联队赴哥伦比亚营地

title: Tottenham draw vs. Leeds: Roberto De Zerbi's side ...
summary: Tottenham drew 1-1 at home with Leeds United, missing an opportunity to extend their lead over West Ham in the Premier League survival race. The dropped points leave Spurs' top-flight status uncertain.

zh.title: 托特纳姆对阵利兹联：德泽比的球队...
